title: Chancellor Search and Screen Committee named
summary_en: Amy B. Bogost, President of the Universities of Wisconsin Board of Regents, and Chris Patton, Executive-in-Charge of the Universities of Wisconsin, have appointed a 23-member Search and Screen Committee to help identify the next UW–Madison chancellor.
title_cn: 威斯康星大学任命麦迪逊分校校长遴选审查委员会

title: 2026 Chancellor’s Undergraduate Awards Ceremony recognizes 179 outstanding students
summary_en: Provost John Zumbrunnen praised the winners for expanding what we know and understand about our world.
title_cn: 威斯康星大学麦迪逊分校举办2026年度校长本科生颁奖典礼表彰179名优秀学生

title: Scientists measure force of powerful jets streaming from a black hole in the Cygnus system
summary_en: The findings confirm a theory posed by UW–Madison researchers a decade ago.
title_cn: 国际科研团队完成天鹅座系统黑洞强喷流功率测量 证实威斯康星大学麦迪逊分校十年前理论预测

title: School spirit and silliness ensue at the Varsity Band Concert
summary_en: The annual performance showcases student talent and celebrates the end of the UW Marching Band season.
title_cn: 威斯康星大学麦迪逊分校举办第50届校管乐队春季音乐会 人才培养成效获认可

title: UW–Madison’s reach throughout Wisconsin adds up to $38.9 billion a year
summary_en: The university supports more than 287,000 jobs and helps drive private-sector growth.
title_cn: 最新研究显示威斯康星大学麦迪逊分校年度对本州经济贡献达389亿美元
summary_cn: 近日，第三方研究机构特里普·翁巴赫发布的最新研究报告显示，美国威斯康星大学麦迪逊分校及其附属机构、所孵化的初创企业每年对威斯康星州经济总贡献达389亿美元。该研究全面量化了该校办学、科研、社会服务等各领域对本州的综合带动效应，印证了该校长期秉持的“办学成果惠及全州”的核心办学使命。
